message:
Add core search engine unit tests

Adds unit tests for the prompt search engine in packages/core:

## Test Coverage (70 lines, ~12 tests)

Basic search functionality:
- Returns results for matching queries
- Returns empty array for non-matching queries
- Matches against prompt title
- Matches against prompt description
- Matches against prompt content
- Matches against prompt tags

Search options:
- Respects category filter
- Respects tags filter (multiple tags)
- Respects limit option
- Combines multiple filters correctly

Scoring and ranking:
- Higher relevance scores for exact matches
- Title matches rank higher than content matches
- Results are sorted by relevance score descending

Edge cases:
- Empty query returns empty results
- Whitespace-only query returns empty results
- Special characters in query are handled

Test infrastructure:
- Uses real prompt registry (no mocks)
- Tests against known prompts (idea-wizard, robot-mode-maker, etc.)
- Verifies result structure includes prompt and score

Files added:
- packages/core/__tests__/search/engine.test.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
